items.a: No. It runs alongside, teaches you what they do.
Maybe. Lifetime guarantees forever access even if it does.

items.q: Do I pay for AI too?
items.a: Yes, BYOK. You use your Anthropic/OpenAI/etc key. Separate cost.
Because productivity without understanding traps you at junior forever.
No fixed deadline. We notify via waitlist when it goes paid.
